title: Dungeon And Village: Ad Astra
description: This modification adds dungeons and villages for the planets of the Ad Astra mod
body:
This modification adds **7** dungeons for the [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra) mod.

![structures from the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0677c8206f9cb7691df21cede5f5ab7c1e89f03d.jpeg)

![structures from the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/735d25a40b5ea7aa241a123a6b3b8dfb88511d3e.jpeg)
_______________________________________________________________________________________
### Support:
- Ad Astra
- Ad Astra Planets+
_______________________________________________________________________________________
All projects for modification **Ad Astra**:

[Simple Structure: Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/datapack/simple-structure-ad-astra)

[Dungeon And Village: Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/project/dungeon-and-village-ad-astra)

[Ad Astra: Recycling](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra-recycling)

[Ad Astra: Ashes of Luyten](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra-ashes-of-luyten)

_______________________________________________________________________________________________
### [All projects are Simple Structures](https://modrinth.com/collection/vinouI3O)

_______________________________________________________________________________________________
**AI** - only the project icon was generated
